checkpoints.action: Implement score-inject.sh outputting segment+recent-events injection block for each of 21 agents

Add score-update.sh call to dev.md after QA completes (Step 12.0) and add score summary to Step 15 report
Add AskUserQuestion 1-5★ + score-update.sh to close.md after CLOSE:YES (Step 3)
Implement test-writer agent that generates pytest+Playwright skeleton tests from Executable AC JSON into tests/generated/<task_id>/
Implement canary SessionStart hook: zero stdout on success, stderr+exit-2 on failure, behavioral (not grep) verification
Fix session-info.sh and session-git-init.sh to redirect stdout to stderr; unify LINE_LIMIT to 1000 in pretool-read-size-guard.py and CLAUDE.md
Read blast-radius-map.json and declare test runs/new tests/explicit exemptions for each coverage_gap in dev report
Ensure test-writer UPDATE vs CREATE logic: archive on ac_uid hash change, skip on hash match, never delete
